resources.string: Contact support to change your email address.
See past payouts and invoice statuses
Sign in to continue to your account
Join us and start earning today
I accept the Terms and Conditions
We\'ve sent a verification code to your email. Please enter it below.
Please enter the confirmation code sent to your email
Enter your email address and we\'ll send you a link to reset your password
Tap to browse and take one
Check available work or update your availability
Swipe to mark on the way
You\'re assigned! Waiting for other employees to confirm before the order can start.
Pick your address on the map
Tap to open the map and place a pin.
Couldn\'t get your location. Try again or move the pin manually.
Location permission needed to center the map.
Drag the map to place the pin
Show you jobs near you, with distance from your home
Calculate your travel pay per kilometre
Issue invoices to the correct tax jurisdiction
Customers never see your home address — only the city you\'re in.
You can still take jobs in nearby serviced cities
We don\'t service this country yet
Are you sure you want to delete this photo?
This feature is under development and will be available soon.
Are you sure you want to delete this note?
Are you sure you want to delete this issue?
No PDF viewer installed on this device.
Optional — used for US / CA only
Toggle each weekday you can work and pick the time window.
Pick the days this applies to, then choose the time window.
Tap a day above to set your hours.
8 digits for CZ/SK; format depends on the chosen country.
Someone we can reach in case of an emergency
Please read and accept our Terms and Conditions to continue using the app.
Use fingerprint or face recognition to log in
Use your biometric credential to log in
Biometric authentication not available on this device
No biometric credentials enrolled. Please set up fingerprint or face recognition in device settings.
PDF, DOC, DOCX, JPG, JPEG, PNG — max 10 MB
Are you sure you want to delete \"%1$s\"?
View orders that are available for you to take
Accept an order to add it to your schedule
Mark the order as started when you begin working
Mark as complete when finished and add notes
Invoices are generated for completed orders. Once approved, you\'ll receive payment according to your payment schedule.
Password must be at least 12 characters
Password must be at least 8 characters with a letter and a number
You must accept the terms and conditions
Pick the country your business is registered in
Pick your address on the map first
Date must be in the past
You must be at least 18 years old
Only letters and numbers are allowed
Manage your cleaning jobs, track your earnings, and grow your client base — all in one place.
Sign in or create an account to see available jobs near you.
Your partner app for managing cleaning orders and earnings
Browse available orders, accept jobs, and track your progress in real-time
View your invoices, monitor payments, and download reports
Keep your information up to date for smooth operations and timely payments
Fill in your details to get started with Cleansia
Set the days and times you\'re available to work.
Unable to connect to server. Please check your internet connection.
Something went wrong. Please try again.
Your session has expired. Please sign in again to continue.
The requested resource was not found.
Server error. Please try again later.
Describe the issue you encountered during this cleaning session.
Add a note about this cleaning session.
Are you sure you want to logout?
You\'ll need to sign in again to continue.
Adjust the working hours for this day.
Override the regular schedule for this date.
Choose your working days and hours.
Before and after photos are required to complete the order
Please add at least one before photo
Please add at least one after photo
Ongoing notification showing order timer progress
Important alerts about order time limits
Order #%1$s has exceeded the estimated time
Notifications are disabled. Please enable them to receive order timer updates and alerts.
New password matches the old password
You are not authorized to perform this action
Failed to send email. Please try again.
Cleaning date must be in the future
No available spots for this order
You are already assigned to this order
You are not assigned to this order
You already have an order in progress
A user with this email already exists
User with this email does not exist
You are not allowed to update this user
A user with this phone number already exists
Employee with this email does not exist
You are not allowed to update this employee
You are not authorized to access this document
This document does not belong to you
Date must be in the past
Page size must be greater than 0
File type does not match content
File size exceeds the maximum allowed limit
File size must not exceed 10 MB
Take at least one \"after\" photo before completing the order.
On your way — see you soon!
Start the job to track progress
Slide below to take this job
Slide to start once you arrive
Complete the steps below to unlock incoming jobs.
Application under review by an administrator.
Finish the steps above first — then admin can approve you.
Your application was rejected. Contact support for details.
Failed to load setup status. Check your connection and try again.
This account uses Google sign-in. Use the Google button.
Use email and password to sign in for this account.
This code is invalid or has expired.
Google sign-in failed. Please try again.
Password must be at least 8 characters with letters and numbers.
This password reset link is invalid or has expired.
Please choose a password different from your old one.
You don\'t have permission to do that.
Your session expired. Please sign in again.
For your security, you\'ve been signed out everywhere.
An account with this email already exists.
No account found with this email.
This phone number is already in use.
No employee found with this email.
Please complete your profile before taking jobs.
Required documents are missing. Please upload them in your profile.
This order is in progress and can\'t be cancelled.
This order was just taken by another cleaner.
No spots available on this order.
You\'ve reached your weekly order limit.
This order conflicts with another you\'ve already taken.
You\'re already assigned to this order.
You\'re not assigned to this order.
This order already has the maximum number of cleaners.
You\'re not eligible to take this order.
You already have another order in progress. Finish it before starting a new one.
Actual time must be greater than zero.
Take at least one \"after\" photo before completing the order.
A review already exists for this order.
Cleaning date must be in the future.
This time is too close. Please choose a later slot.
Total price must be greater than zero.
Price changed. Please refresh and try again.
Couldn\'t create the order. Please try again.
Please provide a label for this address.
Address is too short or too long.
Please pick the address on the map.
Please attach at least one file.
Date must be in the past.
Please enter a valid phone number.
Please enter a valid national ID.
Please enter a valid tax ID.
Please enter a valid ZIP code.
Couldn\'t send email. Try again later.
We don\'t operate in this country yet.
We don\'t operate in this city yet.
No notifications yet. Job updates will show up here.
Updates when a job is confirmed, started, completed, or cancelled.
Notifies you when support responds to your dispute.
Job #%1$s is confirmed. Tap to see the details.
Job #%1$s is underway. Tap to follow along.
Job #%1$s is complete. Tap to see the summary.
Job #%1$s has been cancelled. Tap for details.
Support responded to your dispute. Tap to read it.
Periodic digest of new jobs you can take in your work area.
%1$d new jobs available near you. Tap to view.
Devices signed in to your account. Removing a device signs it out and stops its notifications.
We couldn\'t load your devices. Check your connection and try again.
%1$s will be signed out and will stop receiving notifications.
This device will be removed and you\'ll be signed out immediately.
This device is no longer registered.
No jobs in this period yet.
We couldn\'t load this period\'s pay.
